title: We Are Number One but it's just a Mario Paint cover instead
description:
Also the branch possesses some sort of horrible power.

So, how about those bandwagons? I've never even seen LazyTown, I only know it from when You Are a Pirate went viral a decade or so ago. Yet because of this latest resurgence, it's actually been brought to my attention that Stefan Karl is in recovery from surgery for pancreatic cancer and has a fundraiser going: https://www.gofundme.com/2tm9tqk

Memes to raise awareness. What a time to be alive.

The song is originally by Máni Svavarsson.
